reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 비싸다고 생각했는데 엄청 견고하긴 하네요. 잘 써볼게요.
reviews.content_ja: 高いと思ってましたが、めちゃくちゃ丈夫ですね。大切に使います。
reviews.content_en: I thought it was expensive, but it's really sturdy. I'll use it well.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
잘 적응하나 했는데 아주 좋아하네요
간식 없어도 고정클립만 가져가려고 하면 으르렁대요
꼭 안고 자요ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_ja:
うちの子、慣れるのかなって思ってたのに、すごく気に入ってくれてます。
おやつがなくても、このクリップだけ持ち出そうとするとうなるんです😭
ぎゅっと抱いて寝ちゃいます。
reviews.content_en: I wasn't sure how she'd adapt, but she loves it! 😊 She growls if I try to take just the clip without a treat, and she cuddles with it while sleeping ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 추천받고 구입했어요! 우리 애도 잘 써주길 ㅜㅜ제법 무게감이 있네용
reviews.content_ja: おすすめされて購入しました！うちの子も気に入ってくれるといいな😭結構ずっしりした重さですね。
reviews.content_en: I bought it on recommendation! Hope our pup uses it well ㅜㅜ It has a nice weight to it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 아직 사용전이지만. 굵은 스틱간식도 고정이 될듯하여 마음에 듭니다
reviews.content_ja: まだ使用前ですが、太いスティックおやつも固定できそうなので気に入ってます。
reviews.content_en: Haven't used it yet, but I'm pleased that it seems like it'll secure even thick stick treats

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 쓰던거 강아지가 하도 물어뜯어서 새거삿어요 ㅎㅎ 맘에듭니다
reviews.content_ja: 前に使ってたのをワンちゃんがかじって破いちゃったから新しいの買いました😄気に入ってます。
reviews.content_en: My dog kept chewing up the old one, so I got a new one ㅎㅎ I'm happy with it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 애가 간식을 너무 빨리 먹어치워서 샀어요! 여기 클립에 껴주니까 확실히 허겁지겁 먹어치우지 않는 것 같아요. 디자인도 너무 이뻐서 여러개 비교해보고 바잇미 제품으로 골랐습니다
reviews.content_ja: うちの子がおやつを食べるのが早すぎるから買いました！このクリップに挟むと、確実に食べ急ぐことがなくなった感じです。デザインも超可愛いから、何個か比較した後にバイトミの商品に決めました。
reviews.content_en: My pup was eating treats way too fast, so I got this! Once I clip the treats in here, she definitely doesn't gulp them down as quickly. The design is so cute too that I compared several options and went with the BITE ME product

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 항상 잡아달라고 해서 샀는데 적응기간은 쪼꼼 필요해보이지만 훨씸 편해요 !!
reviews.content_ja: いつも『取って！』ってせがまれてたから買ったんですが、慣れるまでちょっと時間がかかりそうですけど、めちゃくちゃ楽です！！
reviews.content_en: He's always asking me to hold stuff for him, so I bought this. The adjustment period seems to take a little time, but it's SO much easier!! 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
하나 사용중인데 추가로 핑크색을 구입했어요.

저희집 강아지는 ‘뇌수두증’약을 먹다보니 부작용으로 식탐이 폭팔!! 늘 배고파하고 먹을껄 주면 악귀?)들린 미친개 처럼 무섭게 반을을 합니다😰
 한번은 오래씹는  (소가죽껌)줬는데 제대로 안씹고 불려서 그냥 삼켰는지 10cm크기 껌이 통으로 똥쌀때 나오는걸 보고 기겁했네요…🤬😭🥶 내장이 끌려나오는줄…
병원 원장님께서도 장을 통과해서 나온게 신기하고 살아있는게 대단하다고 놀라셨어요… 그후로도 씹어서 먹어야되는 모든걸 꿀꺽해서 2~3번 질식해서 죽는줄 알고 그후 간식을 안주다가 이 제춤을 우연히 알게되면서 어찌나 기분이 좋던지, 바로 구입해서 간식줬습니다!!

근데 너무 얇은(사진중하나) 간식은 먹다가 쏙~빠지는 경우가 있더라구요. 그리고 사진에보이는 뼈다귀모양 껌은 
넣을수 없어서 양쪽을 풀어서(엄청힘들지만😰)  고정집게 통과후 꽉~잡아서 확인후 주는데 긴껌은 저희집 아이에겐 위험하더라구요…  씹고 자르면서 먹어야 하는데 
씹기만 하고 계속 입으로~목구멍 깊숙하게 넣어서 켁켁거리는 경우도 있다보니 두개가 필요합니다!
모든 긴 껌을 양쪽 두개가 잡아줘야 빠지는것도 방지하고
적당량 먹고 포기하게 되더라구요…

늘 배고파하는 아픈아이에게 씹는 재미까지 뺏는게 미안했는데 이제품 쓰게 되면서  너무너무 만족하며 사용중입니다!!! 양손으로 잡아가면 넘 잘먹어요~간식을~^^
거기에 디자인과 컬러감까지 뭐하나 빠지는게 없어요~~
먹는모습은 예전 사진인데 두개을 동시에 사용하는 사진도 곧 올려볼께요~~~(간식클립) 정말 최고입니다! 
이런거 만들어 주셔서 넘 감사해요!
reviews.content_ja:
1個使ってるんですが、追加でピンク色も買いました。

うちのワンちゃんは『水頭症』の薬を飲んでるから、副作用で食欲が爆発😰いつもお腹空いてて、ご飯をあげるとまるで悪霊に取り憑かれたみたいに怖い勢いで食べます😰
ある時、よく噛むタイプの（牛皮ガム）をあげたんですが、ちゃんと噛まずに膨らませて、そのまま飲み込んじゃったみたいで、10cm大のガムが丸ごと💩の時に出てくるのを見てビックリしました…🤬😭🥶 腸が引っ張り出されるかと思った…
病院の院長先生も、腸を通過して出てきたのが不思議で、生きてるのが凄いってびっくりされてました…その後も、噛んで食べるべきものはみんな丸飲みしちゃうし、2～3回は窒息して死ぬかと思うほどでした。その後はおやつをあげるのをやめてたんですが、この商品をたまたま知ってから、どんなに嬉しかったか…すぐに買ってめちゃくちゃ使ってます！！

ただ、すごく薄い（写真の1つ）おやつだと、ふと～ぽろっと抜けちゃうことがあるんです。そして写真に見える骨の形のガムは入らないから、両側を無理やり（すごく力が必要ですが😰）開いて、クリップを通した後にギュッと掴んで確認してからあげてるんですが、長いガムはうちの子には危ないんですよね…噛んで切りながら食べないといけないのに、噛むだけで、ずっと口から喉の奥深くまで入れちゃって、えっぇっってなることもあるから2個必要です！
全ての長いガムを両側の2個でしっかり掴んであげれば、抜けるのも防げるし、ちょうどいい量で諦めるようになるんですよ…

いつもお腹が空いてる病気のうちの子に、噛む楽しみまで取り上げるのが可哀想だったんですが、この商品を使うようになってから、本当に本当に満足して使ってます！！！両手で掴んであげると、すごく上手に食べます～おやつを～^^何もかも素晴らしくて、デザインと色合いも完璧です～～
食べてる様子は昔の写真ですが、2個を同時に使ってる写真もすぐにアップしますね～～～（おやつクリップ）本当に最高です！
こんなの作ってくださって、本当に感謝します！
reviews.content_en:
I've been using one and just bought the pink one too.

My dog is on hydrocephalus medication, and a side effect is insatiable hunger!! She's always starving and when I give her food, she eats like a possessed crazy dog 😰 One time I gave her a long-lasting rawhide chew and instead of chewing it properly, she must have just swallowed it whole—when a 10cm chew came out whole in her poop, I was terrified… 🤬😭🥶 I thought her intestines were coming out…

Even the vet was amazed that it passed through her intestines and couldn't believe she survived… After that, whenever she'd try to swallow anything chewy without properly chewing, she'd choke 2-3 times and I'd think she was dying. So I stopped giving her treats. But then I discovered this product by chance and was SO happy! I bought it right away and started giving her treats again!!

But some very thin treats (like in one of the photos) do slip out while she's eating. And those bone-shaped chews can't fit in, so I have to pry them open (which is really hard 😰) and squeeze the clip tight to make sure before giving them. But long chews are risky for my pup… She's supposed to chew and bite off pieces, but she just keeps pushing them deep into her throat without cutting them, causing her to gag. So I need TWO clips!

When both clips hold the long treats, it prevents them from slipping out and she ends up eating an appropriate amount before giving up…

I felt bad taking away the joy of chewing from my sick pup who's always hungry, but using this product now, I'm SO incredibly satisfied!!! She eats so well holding it with both paws~with the treats~^^ And there's nothing lacking in the design and colors either~~

The photos show her eating from before—I'll upload a photo of her using both clips at the same time soon~~~(treat clip) It's truly the best!

Thank you so much for making this!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
강아지가 너무 좋아하네요.
장난감인줄 빨아요.
reviews.content_ja:
ワンちゃんが本当に気に入ってくれてます。
おもちゃだと思って舐めちゃってます。
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much. She sucks on it like it's a toy.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
이거 너무 좋아요 
진짜 껌 어느정도 남으면 바로 삼키는 성격 개급한 갱얼쥐인데 이거 주면 구래도 삼키기보다 끝까지 먹으려는게 있어서 
너무 좋아요! 하나 더 구매해서 교대로 쓸 예정입니다!
reviews.content_ja:
これ本当にいいです！
本当にガムが少し残るとすぐに飲み込んじゃう、悪ガキな癖のあるやんちゃな子なんですが、これをあげると、それでも飲み込むより最後まで食べようとするのがあって、本当にいいです！もう1個買って、交替で使う予定です！
reviews.content_en: I love this thing! My dog is the type to swallow treats whole as soon as there's any left—a reckless little guy—but with this, he actually tries to eat it all the way through instead of just gulping it down. I'm so happy with it! I'm planning to buy one more so we can use them alternately!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
터키츄 같은 딱딱한 간식 끝에 많이 남은걸 급하게 삼켜서 켁켁할때가 있어서 걱정되서 사봤어요. 
플라스틱 나사 같은걸 이렇게 비싸게 사야하나 만족했는데 무게가 있어서 강아지가 쉽게 넘어뜨리지 않고 간식도 안빠지게 확실히 고정해줘서 너무 안심이 되요. 돈이 아깝디 않습니다. 매우 만족.
reviews.content_ja: ターキーチューなどの硬いおやつの端が残ったときに、急いで飲み込んでオエッとなることがあったので心配で買ってみました。プラスチックのネジみたいなもので、こんなに高いのかと思っていたのですが、重みがあるので愛犬が簡単に倒してしまわず、おやつもしっかり固定されるので本当に安心できます。お金の価値があります。とても満足です。
reviews.content_en: My pup used to choke (hack, hack!) when she'd gulp down the hard bits left at the end of treats like turkey chews, so I was worried and decided to try this. I was skeptical about paying so much for what's basically a plastic screw, but I'm really satisfied! It's heavy enough that my dog can't easily knock it over, and it securely holds the treats so they don't fall out - it's so reassuring. Totally worth the money. Very satisfied.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 두번째구매입니다!!!
reviews.content_ja: 2回目の購入です！！！
reviews.content_en: This is my second purchase!!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 감사합니다 잘쓸게여어~`
reviews.content_ja: ありがとうございます。大切に使いますね～
reviews.content_en: Thank you! I'll use it well~ 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 잘쓸게여 감사합니다앙~
reviews.content_ja: 大切に使います。ありがとうございます～😊
reviews.content_en: I'll use it well, thank you so much~ 🥰

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
3살 성격급한 먹보공주 껌 간식을 먹을때 엄청 급하게 먹다가 목에 많이 걸려서 꽥꽥, 한번에 꿀꺽.. 

아가때 응급실까지 다녀올정도의 이력까지 있어서.. 

여러브랜드 비교하다가 제일 괜찮은것 같아서 주문했어요~~

확실히 얇은 간식 고정도 엄청 꽉 잘되고요~ 
아가들이 발로 잡고 먹기도 편한것 같더라고요~ 
처음부터 저렇게 야무지게 잘 잡고 잘 먹어요~~
확실히 고정 잘되어 있어서 끝까지 다 먹을때까지 목에 걸려서 꽥꽥 거리지 않고 잘 먹을 수 있어요~ 

좋은제품 감사드려요~ 수고하세요~😊
reviews.content_ja: 3才の性格が急かし食べっ子公主が、ガム系のおやつを食べるときにものすごく急いで食べるので、喉に詰まることが多くて、ケッケッ、一気にゴクッと...赤ちゃんのときは救急車で病院に行ったこともあるほどの経歴があって...いろいろなブランドを比較して一番良さそうだったので注文しました～～確かに薄いおやつもしっかり固定されるし～子どもたちが足で掴んで食べるのも簡単みたいです～最初からあんなに上手に掴んで食べてくれます～～確実に固定されているので、最後まで食べるまで喉に詰まることなく上手に食べられます～いい商品をありがとうございます～お疲れ様です～😊
reviews.content_en: My 3-year-old is an impatient little treat-loving princess who eats gum treats SO fast that she gets it caught in her throat a lot - she chokes and gags, sometimes swallowing it all at once... She even had to go to the ER when she was younger because of this. 😅 After comparing several brands, this seemed like the best option, so I ordered it! The suction definitely works really well even with thin treats~ And the pups can grab it with their paws and eat comfortably~ She's been gripping and eating so well from the start! Since it holds the treats securely, she can eat all the way through without choking or gagging~ Thank you for such a great product~ 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 처음에는 잘 못쓰더니 나중에는 혼자 터득해서 잘 사용하더라구요! 원래도 간식을 손으로 안만지는 성격인데 여기에 끼워주니 잡더라구요ㅎㅎ 무게감도있고 튼튼해보여서 좋아요
reviews.content_ja: 最初はうまく使えませんでしたが、後になって自分で工夫してうまく使うようになりました！元々おやつを手で触らない性格だったのですが、これに挟んであげたら掴むようになりました😄重みもあるし、丈夫に見えるので良いです。
reviews.content_en: At first she didn't know how to use it, but later she figured it out on her own and used it well! She's normally the type who won't touch treats with her paws, but when I put the treat in here, she actually grabs it lol. It feels substantial and looks sturdy, which is great!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
강아지가 좋아 합니다.
감사합니다.
reviews.content_ja: 愛犬が気に入っています。ありがとうございます。
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it. Thank you.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
끝부분 조금씩 남을때마다 삼킬까봐 걱정됐능데
이거쓰니까 좋아요
reviews.content_ja: 端の部分が少しずつ残るたびに飲み込んでしまうのではないかと心配でしたが、これを使ったら良いですね。
reviews.content_en: I was always worried she'd swallow the little bits left at the end, but this makes it so much better!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 기존 사용하던건 다른 사람에게 뺏기고 다시 구매했어요 ㅎㅎ  항상 만족하면서 사용하고 있어요
reviews.content_ja: 以前使っていたものは別の人に取られてしまったので、また買い直しました😄いつも満足して使っています。
reviews.content_en: Someone took the one I was using before, so I bought another one lol. I'm always satisfied and keep using it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
잡고뜯어야하는데
아직 못하네요
reviews.content_ja: 掴んで引き裂く必要があるのですが、まだできていません。
reviews.content_en: You're supposed to grab and pull the treat out, but my pup hasn't figured that out yet.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 사용하기 편해요 ~
reviews.content_ja: 使いやすいです～
reviews.content_en: It's really easy to use ~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 크기가생각보다 크고 무겁지만 잡아주는힘이 좋아요 다른거는 간식이 숑숑 빠지는데
reviews.content_ja: サイズが思ったより大きくて重いですが、しっかり掴む力がいいですね。他のやつはおやつがすぐ落ちちゃうんですが
reviews.content_en: It's bigger and heavier than I thought, but it holds really well! Other products let treats slip right through though

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지가 개껌 먹을때 편하라고 샀어요.
reviews.content_ja: ワンちゃんがおやつを食べる時に便利だと思って買いました。
reviews.content_en: I bought it to make it easier for my dog to chew on treats.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
사진보다 더예쁘고 튼튼한거 같아요
간식줄때 잘 사용할게요
reviews.content_ja: 写真より更に可愛くて丈夫そうです。おやつをあげる時によく使わせてもらいます。
reviews.content_en: It looks even prettier and sturdier than in the photos 😊 I'll definitely use it when giving treats

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
기존에 ㅍㅅㄹ꺼 사용했는데 굵은 간식은 고정이 안되서 새로 찾아 보던 중
이 제품은 고정 제한 길이가 더 커서 구매했어요
두꺼운 것도 잘 고정되고 납작해서 더 잘 잡고 먹네요
너무 좋아요♡
reviews.content_ja: 前に別のやつを使ってたんですが、太いおやつは固定されなくて、新しく探してた時にこの商品を見つけました。固定できる長さがもっと長いので購入しました。厚いものもしっかり固定されるし、平らだからもっとよく掴んで食べてますね。最高です♡
reviews.content_en: I used to use a different brand, but it couldn't hold thicker treats in place so I was looking for something new. This product has a larger fixing range, so I got it. It holds even thick treats securely and because it's flat, my dog can grip and chew much better. Love it so much♡

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
이쁘네요~~ㅋㅋ
이런 디스펜서 필요 했는데 ~~ 역시 바잇미+_+
튼튼하고 고정 완전 잘 됩니다^^ 굿굿~~
reviews.content_ja: 可愛いですね～～ㅋㅋこんなディスペンサー欲しかったんです～～やっぱりバイトミ+_+丈夫で固定がめっちゃいいです^^ グッドグッド～～
reviews.content_en: It's pretty~~ㅋㅋ I needed a dispenser like this~~ BITE ME is the way to go +_+ It's durable and the grip works perfectly^^ Love it~~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 다른거보다 좀 비쌌는데 넘예쁘고 튼튼하고 쓰기편해요!
reviews.content_ja: 他のより少し高めでしたが、超可愛くて丈夫で使いやすいです！
reviews.content_en: It's a bit pricier than other brands, but it's so pretty, sturdy, and really easy to use!

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 처음 적응할 시간 필요하려나 했는데 먹보라 그런지 바로 본능적으로 사용하네요ㅋㅋㅋ 오래먹는다는 우피나 껌 줘봐도 항상 꿀떡꿀떡 삼켜대서 걱정이었는데 아주 짱짱하게 잡아주니까 급하게 먹지 못하네요!! 이 상품 나오자마자 눈여겨봤는데 1+1 묶음 할인하길래 바로 겟!!!! 후회 없습니다!!
reviews.content_ja: 最初は慣れるのに時間がかかるのかなと思ってたんですが、食いしん坊だからかすぐ本能的に使ってますｗｗｗ長く食べるっていうウフィナやガムをあげても、いつもゴクゴク飲み込んじゃってて心配だったんですが、めっちゃしっかり掴んでくれるから急いで食べられなくなりました！！この商品が出たらすぐチェックしてたんですが、1+1バンドル割引してたから即ゲット！！！後悔なしです！！
reviews.content_en: I thought my dog might need some time to adjust, but being such a foodie, he figured it out right away lol When I give him long-lasting chews or treats, he usually just swallows them whole which was a big worry, but this holds them so firmly that he can't rush through them!! I've had my eye on this product since it came out, and when I saw the 1+1 bundle discount, I grabbed it right away!!!! No regrets!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우신을 너무 급하게 인씹고 삼켜서 자다가 토하는일이 두번있었어요
그래서 구매했는데 그뒤론 삼키는일없이 잘씹어먹네요
그대신 저거 지킨다고 가까이 못오게해요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_ja: ウシンを急いで噛んで飲み込んじゃって、寝てる時に吐く事が2回ありました。だから購入したんですが、それ以降は飲み込まずによく噛んで食べてますね。その代わり、それを守るためにうちの子は近づけさせてくれません笑笑
reviews.content_en: My dog (우신) used to bite and swallow treats way too fast, and he'd throw up a couple times after naps. That's why I bought this, and since then he's been chewing properly without swallowing! But now he won't let me get near him when he's using itㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무좋아요. 잘쓰고있어요
reviews.content_ja: すごくいいです。よく使ってます。
reviews.content_en: I love it so much. Using it well!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무좋아요. 잘쓰고있어요
reviews.content_ja: とても良いです。よく使わせてもらっています。
reviews.content_en: I love it so much. Using it great!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 기존 다른 제품보다 짧아서 좋네요
reviews.content_ja: 既存の他の製品より短くて良いですね。
reviews.content_en: It's shorter than other products I've used before, and I like that!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
저희집 강아지가 간식을 한 입에 삼키는 버릇이 있는데 요 바잇미 간식클립 사용해 주니까 훨씬 오랫동안 먹어요 ! 
고정력도 진짜 강하고 사용하기 편해요 !
세척도 간편하고 강아지가 물고 뜯어도 흠집 정도만 나고 내구성도 강해요 ㅎㅎ 
너무 너무 잘 쓰고 있어요 길다란 간식 사서 개껌이든 건조 간식이든 끼워주면 환장 한답니당 .. 🤍
reviews.content_ja:
うちのワンちゃんがおやつを一口で飲み込んでしまう癖があるんですが、このバイトミおやつクリップを使ってからはずっと長く食べられるようになりました！
固定力も本当に強くて、使いやすいです！
洗浄も簡単で、ワンちゃんが噛んだり引っ張ったりしても傷程度で済むし、耐久性も強いです ㅎㅎ
すごく重宝させてもらっています。長めのおやつを買って、犬用ガムでも乾燥おやつでも装着してあげると、もう夢中になっちゃいますよ… 🤍
reviews.content_en: My dog has a habit of swallowing treats in one bite, but using this BITE ME treat clip makes them last so much longer! 🤍 The grip is really strong and it's so easy to use! Cleaning is super simple too, and even when my dog chews on it, it only gets minor scratches—the durability is amazing! We absolutely love it. When I get long treats and clip them in, whether it's dog chew or dried treats, my pup goes crazy for it! 🤍

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 단단하고 고정도 잘돼서 좋아요! 주는 간식이 조금 울퉁불퉁해서 고정이 잘 되려나 걱정했는데 안 빠지고 좋습니당 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_ja: 硬くて固定も上手くいくので良いです！あげるおやつが少しデコボコしていたので、ちゃんと固定されるか心配だったんですが、ズレ落ちなくて良かったです ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's nice and sturdy with great holding power! I was worried that the treat might be a bit bumpy and not hold well, but it doesn't slip out and works great! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀여운 모습과 달리 묵직해서 좋네요
reviews.content_ja: 可愛らしい見た目とは裏腹に、ずっしりとして良いですね。
reviews.content_en: Despite its cute appearance, it has nice weight to it, which is great!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 생각대로 잘 써주네요 가격이 생각보다 비싸다...?
reviews.content_ja: 思った通りにちゃんと使えます。ただ、値段が思ったより高い…？
reviews.content_en: It works just as expected. Though the price is a bit higher than I thought...?

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 배송빨리왔어요 가격은 비싼거같아영
reviews.content_ja: 配送が早く届きました。値段は思ったより高いような気がします。
reviews.content_en: Shipping came fast but the price seems a bit expensive

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
생각보닾튼튼 해욮
괜찮네요 고정도 잘되고
reviews.content_ja:
思ったより丈夫です。
悪くないですね。固定も上手くいくし。
reviews.content_en: It's sturdier than expected and works great. The grip is solid too!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
어제 처음으로 우유껌에 끼워줬더니 거부감없이 편하게 잘 먹네요ㅎㅎ
현재 이갈이중이라 플라스틱을 자주 깨무는데 테두리에 살짝 거친 부분이 있어 네일파일로 갈아줬더니 매끄러워졌어요ㅋ
reviews.content_ja:
昨日初めてミルク風味ガムに装着してあげたら、嫌がることなく楽に食べられていますㅎㅎ
現在歯が生え変わり中で、プラスチックをよく噛んでいるんですが、縁に少しざらついた部分があったので、ネイルファイルで磨いたら滑らかになりました。
reviews.content_en: I clipped it on a milk chew for the first time yesterday and my dog had no problem with it and ate comfortably! ㅎㅎ My pup is currently teething and chews on plastic a lot, so there were some slightly rough edges, but after smoothing them with a nail file it became nice and smooth!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 야무지게 잘 잡고 먹어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_ja: しっかり上手に掴んで食べています ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog holds and eats it really well! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 튼튼하고 이쁘게 잘 사용하고 있어요 애기들 장난감처럼 이뻐요이뻐~~
reviews.content_ja: しっかりしていて、きれいに使えています。子どもたちのおもちゃのようで可愛いです。可愛い～～
reviews.content_en: It's sturdy and pretty, and we're using it well! The kids think it's adorable 😍😍

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
구름이가 처음에는 낯설어서 간식을 잘 안 먹고 보기만 하더라구요
근데 시간이 조금 지나고 먹기 시작하더니 두 손으로 잡고 먹네요ㅎㅎ
터키츄가 딱딱한데 너무 급하게 먹고 대충 삼키는 것 같아서 먹일 때마다 불안해서 항상 지켜봤었거든요
근데 이 제품 쓰고 난 뒤부터는 터키츄를 먹일 때 불안하지 않아요ㅎㅎ
너무 마음에 들어요!
reviews.content_ja: クムイは最初は珍しくて、おやつをあまり食べずに見てるだけだったんです。でも時間が少し経ったら食べ始めたら、両手で持って食べるようになりました😄　ターキチューは硬いのに、いつも急いで食べて大雑把に飲み込んでる感じがして、あげるたびに不安で常に見守ってたんですよ。でもこの商品を使ってからはターキチューをあげるときに不安じゃないんです😄　本当に気に入りました！
reviews.content_en: At first, Gureum was unfamiliar with it and wouldn't eat the treat, just looked at it. But after a little time passed, he started eating it and now holds it with both paws 😄 Turkey chews are hard and he used to eat too fast and swallow roughly, so I was always anxious and had to watch him every time. But ever since using this product, I don't feel anxious when giving him turkey chews anymore 😄 I love it so much!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 바른제품입니다 빠른배송
reviews.content_ja: 良い製品です。発送も早いです。
reviews.content_en: Great product. Fast shipping

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 잘써요!!!:)
reviews.content_ja: ワンちゃんがとても気に入ってます！！！😊
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much!!! :)

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 전에도 한번주문해서 하나더 주문했는데 저번에 블루주문해서 이번에 핑크주문했는데 블루가 또왔지만 그냥사용하려구요 튼튼하니 좋은상품이라
reviews.content_ja: 前も一度注文して、もう一つ注文したんですけど、前回はブルーを注文して今回はピンクを注文したのにまたブルーが来たんですけど、そのまま使う予定です。しっかりしてるから良い商品ですね。
reviews.content_en: I ordered once before and ordered again. Last time I got blue but this time I ordered pink and blue came again, but I'm just going to use it anyway. It's durable so it's a good product

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 껌을 좋아하는데 항상 ㅛㅏㅁ켜서 구매
reviews.content_ja: ガムが好きなので、いつも噛んじゃって購入しています。
reviews.content_en: My dog loves gum and I always end up ordering because it runs out

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
기존꺼 파란색과 구분하려고 분홍색 시켰는데,또 파란색이 왔어요.ㅠ
교환하기 번거로워 그냥 씁니다.
단단하고 편해서 좋긴해요
reviews.content_ja: 元々のブルーと区別するためにピンクにしたのに、またブルーが来ました。😢　交換するのが面倒なのでそのまま使います。硬くて使いやすいから良いですね。
reviews.content_en: I ordered pink to distinguish it from the existing blue one, but blue came again 😢 It's a hassle to exchange so I'm just using it. It's firm and convenient so it's nice

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
명절에 들고 갔다가 잃어버려서ㅜ
재구매 했습니다
제품이 은근 묵직해서 사용하기 좋아요!
reviews.content_ja: 休日に持って行ったら失くしちゃったので😢　再購入しました。商品が結構ずっしりしてるので使いやすいです！
reviews.content_en: I took it on a holiday trip and lost it 😭 So I reordered. The product is pretty sturdy and feels good to use!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 색상이 예뻐서 구입 사용하는데 편해요!
reviews.content_ja: 色がきれいだから購入して、使っていて便利です！
reviews.content_en: The color is pretty so I bought it and it's convenient to use!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 완전 튼튼하고 불리스틱 끼워주기 좋아요
reviews.content_ja: すごく丈夫で、ブリースティックを付けるのに良いですね。
reviews.content_en: Super durable and great for putting in the bullystick!
